kpis.base_search:
| `itoa_rest("entity", "title", "(win|lnx)-\\\\\d+", "")`
| eval mtx=spath(value, "_itsi_informational_lookups{}")
| fields mtx id title
| mvexpand mtx
| rex field=mtx "^mtx:(?<metric>[^=]+)=(?<base>.+)"
| eval r=random()%1000/1000, n=case(metric IN ("mem", "disk"), max(0, base-(random()%base)/10)+r, 
              metric=="cpu", min(100, r+base+(random()%base)/10), 
              1==1, ceil(base+(random()%base/10)) )
| chart latest(n) over title by metric
| rename title as host 
| eval _time=now()
kpis.title: Cache Hit Ratio
